name: Zombie Monsters
description: Five shambling undead NPCs generated as a drop-in content pack test.

characters.name: Fresh Grave Riser
characters.prompt:
Fantasy tabletop character artwork of a single undead zombie monster.
Art style: grim dark fantasy RPG bestiary illustration, aged ink drawing with muted corpse-toned watercolor, rough linework, damaged armor and torn cloth, unsettling but readable silhouette.
Expression: vacant dead stare, slack jaw, predatory posture, corpse-like stillness.
Body details: rotting flesh, exposed bone, dried blood, torn skin, muddy feet, damaged equipment, patchy hair, dead cloudy eyes.
Framing: centered full-body subject, visible from head to toe, clear silhouette, isolated on a plain white background, no scenery, no environment, no floor shadows. Character kin: a humanoid undead zombie monster. Gender: undead. Profession: a shambling undead corpse with crude ruined gear. Defining trait: recently risen from the grave, dirt-covered, wet burial cloth, barely decayed.
